summary: Moved qd roadmap finding validation into a dedicated sourced helper while preserving the public validate_roadmap_findings entry point and existing validation behavior.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh sources a dedicated finding validation helper.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh now sources scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap-findings.sh using the existing shellcheck source-comment pattern.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: validate_roadmap_findings remains the public function called by the qd report checker.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap-findings.sh defines validate_roadmap_findings, and validate_roadmap_export continues to call validate_roadmap_findings through the existing qd report-check flow.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The moved checker still rejects malformed finding node ids, severity/status values, content fields, optional paths, lines, and timestamps.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Focused temporary-copy smoke logs under evidence/m4-qd-finding-check-modularize/ record expected rejections for unknown node_id, bad severity/status, malformed id/content, bad path, bad line, and bad timestamp.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: All qd report-check helper files remain below the configured line budget.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-check-modularize/line-count-check.log records scripts/qd-report-check/*.sh and scripts/qd-reports-check.sh below the 350-line budget.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-check-modularize/qd-reports-check.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, line-count evidence, and focused negative smokes for moved finding validation.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, line-count-check.log, and the focused negative smoke logs.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Only Linux repository validation is claimed; realWorldValidation is not_required.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report-check modularization only; no product runtime, platform, media, cross-device, or macOS-specific behavior is claimed.
